node_types.ROOT: The entry point; orchestrates high-level project goals.
node_types.PLANNER: Intermediate node; splits tasks into JSON arrays of sub-tasks.
node_types.EXECUTOR: Leaf node; performs the actual git worktree coding and testing.
node_types.AGGREGATOR: Manager node; merges child diffs and runs conflict resolution.

environment_management.isolation: Network-isolated loopback IPs per node (127.0.0.2, etc.)

merging_protocol.step_1: Wait for all child nodes to reach COMPLETED state.
merging_protocol.step_2: Aggregator agent pulls 'git diff' from all child worktrees.
merging_protocol.step_3: Run LLM-based Conflict Resolver to synthesize the code.
merging_protocol.step_4: Apply synthesized code to Parent Worktree and run 'npm test'.
merging_protocol.step_5: If parent tests pass, mark Parent as COMPLETED.
